policies.name: Udyam Registration
policies.description: Official MSME registration portal enabling priority sector lending, subsidies, and tender preferences.
eligibility_criteria: Investment and turnover within MSME limits

policies.name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
policies.description: Collateral-free credit guarantee for MSME loans up to ₹5 Cr.

policies.name: Production Linked Incentive — Automobile & Auto Components
policies.description: PLI scheme boosting domestic auto component manufacturing and EV supply chain.

policies.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
policies.description: Micro-finance scheme for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.

policies.name: Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme
policies.description: 15% capital subsidy for technology upgradation in MSME manufacturing.

policies.name: Make in India 2.0
policies.description: National manufacturing push with sector-specific production targets and FDI facilitation.
benefits: Domestic demand preference in govt procurement

policies.name: PLI — Advanced Chemistry Cell Battery Storage
policies.description: Incentivises ACC battery manufacturing for EV and energy storage ecosystems.

policies.name: MSME Samadhaan — Delayed Payment Monitoring
policies.description: Portal for filing delayed payment complaints against buyers (Section 16 MSMED Act).
benefits: Recovery of delayed payments with interest

policies.name: Zero Defect Zero Effect (ZED) Certification
policies.description: Quality and sustainability certification programme for MSME manufacturers.

policies.name: PM-KUSUM / Rooftop Solar Subsidy
policies.description: Subsidies for solar rooftop installations reducing energy costs and Scope 2 emissions.

policies.name: Emergency Credit Line Guarantee Scheme (ECLGS successor)
policies.description: Guaranteed emergency credit for MSMEs during economic stress periods.

policies.name: BEE Star Label / PAT Scheme
policies.description: Energy efficiency labelling and Perform-Achieve-Trade for designated consumers.
eligibility_criteria: Designated energy consumer or voluntary labelling

policies.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
policies.description: Seed funding and incubation support for DPIIT-recognised startups.
